content:
### Structured Log Events
### ProcessingReport (returned to caller)

## Dependency Chain

```
M3.3 (Chunking) has NO hard dependency on M3/M3.1/M3.2
  - Shares TokenEstimator with M3.2 (D64)
  - M3.2's Retriever consumes chunks M3.3 produces
  - Can be built in parallel with M3.1/M3.2
```


## Test Strategy

| Component | Approach |
|-----------|----------|
| `ChunkingPipeline` | Unit test: mock strategy, verify merge/split/overlap orchestration |
| `FormatRegistry` | Unit test: register/override/resolve priority chain |
| `AstChunker` | Unit test: known Rust/Python/JS files → expected chunks (migrate existing tree-sitter tests) |
| `MarkdownChunker` | Unit test: heading hierarchy → sections, oversized section splitting |
| `ConfigChunker` | Unit test: TOML/YAML/JSON → key-based chunks |
| `PdfChunker` | Unit test: extracted text → paragraph chunks |
| `FallbackChunker` | Unit test: recursive separator cascade |
| `TokenEstimator` | Unit test: chars/4 heuristic, budget enforcement |
| Merge pass | Unit test: small chunks merge, respects merge_group, stops at budget |
| Split pass | Unit test: oversized chunks recurse, all outputs fit budget |
| E2E integration | Ingest real repo through full pipeline, verify chunk quality metrics |
